Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $84,136,909Details
International Box Office $5,339,356
Worldwide Box Office $89,476,265
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$28,416,365 (33.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.96 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:94.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,091 opening theaters/3,104 max. theaters, 4.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $162,041,459

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 9th, 2004 (Wide) by Dreamworks SKG
International Releases: October 22nd, 2004 (Wide), released as Anchor Man: The Legend Of Ron Burgundy (Australia)
Video Release: December 28th, 2004 by Dreamworks Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexual humor, language and comic violence.
Running Time: 95 minutes
Franchise: Anchorman
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead, Breaking the Fourth Wall, Frat Pack, Gratuitous Cameos, Intertitle, Voiceover/Narration
Plot point: Closeted Homosexual, Learning Disabilities, LGBTQ+, News, Satire
Social setting: TV News
Source material: Based on an UNTRUE Story, Judd Apatow Buddy Comedy
Subgenre: Satirical Comedy
Time period setting: 1970s
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: DreamWorks Pictures, Judd Apatow
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
